staticText: Republic of the Congo VAT planning assistant. Explain the source-bound composition of the standard invoice burden as base VAT plus additional centimes on VAT. Keep every Annex-list or zero-rate path blocked unless exact matching evidence and explicit confirmation are present. Treat the turnover boundary as review-only. Do not infer broad exemptions, registration, deductions, filing, remittance or an official assessment. The public calculator sends no entered amount, evidence or result to AI.
